Nexus Card Executive Briefing Request Briefing
Publications · 2026

UNMASK Blueprint
Series.

A trilogy for personal, institutional, and collective transformation.

Published under Nikki Cates LLC and Strategic Transformations, the UNMASK Blueprint trilogy is a multi-format intellectual framework available in print, eBook, and interactive app. Each volume builds on the proprietary UNMASK Framework: a diagnostic and recalibration methodology that identifies hidden strains and rebuilds authentic leadership capacity.

Access the Series
Volume 1 · Individual Level

The UNMASK Blueprint

Deconstruction of the Grind

by Nikki Cates · 5x8 print · eBook · Interactive App

Volume 1 centers the individual journey, unmasking internalized performance pressures and reclaiming rest as a radical act of self-possession. It introduces the Leadership Masking Index (LMI) and dismantles the "grind" culture that disproportionately burns out the leaders organizations can least afford to lose.

Moving from "performative survival" to "liberated capacity," this volume uses narrative vignettes and reflective exercises to address identity fragmentation, boundary erosion, and emotional labor. Grounded in Womanist theology that positions rest as a strategic act of resistance, not retreat.

Key Diagnostic Tool

→

Leadership Masking Index (LMI)

Identifies the masks leaders wear and the structural conditions demanding they wear them.

Early user pilots report 30 to 50% reductions in self-reported burnout through the LMI frameworks.

Get Vol. 1 Bulk / Institutional Inquiry
Volume 2 · Institutional Level Most Requested

The UNMASK Blueprint

Redesigning Systems for the AI Acceleration Era

by Nikki Cates · 6x9 print · eBook · Interactive App with calculators and scenario planners

Volume 2 moves to organizational architecture, diagnosing and repairing systemic failures that amplify burnout including authority gaps and AI-accelerated overload. It introduces the Responsibility-Authority Asymmetry (RAA) Index and the AI Acceleration Burnout Index, providing concrete metrics for institutional health in the AI era.

Through the concept of "structural imago" (inherent worth in systems) and tools like The Three Leaks (energy drains in hierarchies), this volume shifts from individual coping to collective redesign, with case studies on nonprofits and mission-driven teams.

Key Diagnostic Tools

→

RAA Index

Measures the gap between responsibility assigned and authority granted.

→

AI Acceleration Burnout Index

Quantifies how AI-era overload compounds existing structural strain.

→

The Three Leaks

Identifies the three primary energy drains embedded in hierarchical structures.

Get Vol. 2 Institutional License Inquiry
Volume 3 · Collective Level

The UNMASK Blueprint

The Soul of the System

by Nikki Cates · 7x10 print · eBook · Interactive App with collaborative modules

Volume 3 is for the leader who has done everything right and is still the one holding it all. It moves to the broader ecosystem, empowering communities through shared recalibration. It introduces the Canary Signal (early warnings of collapse) and Load Path (distributing systemic weight), alongside faith-based and justice-centered strategies for collective resilience.

Drawing on the Greene Legacy (historical Womanist influences) and "radical subjectivity" as strategy, this volume addresses collective masking in AI-disrupted environments through group exercises designed for educators and empowerers. It is a blueprint for structural sovereignty: the architecture of leading without becoming the single point of organizational failure.

Key Concepts

→

Canary Signal

Detects early-warning signs of collective structural collapse before the breaking point.

→

Load Path Analysis

Maps how systemic weight is distributed and redistributed across the collective.

→

Greene Legacy Framework

Historical Womanist influences as strategic foundation for collective recalibration.

Get Vol. 3 Bulk / Institutional Inquiry

Get the complete series.

All three volumes are available in print, eBook, and interactive app formats. Individual, team, and institutional licensing available.

Access the UNMASK Checkout
Licensing

Deploy UNMASK in Your Organization

The UNMASK Framework is licensable for individual practitioners and institutional deployment. All licensing inquiries begin with the Executive Briefing process.

👤

Individual License

Personal use for leaders, coaches, and practitioners. Single-user access to all three volumes in print, eBook, and app formats with rights for individual client engagements.

Purchase Individual
👥

Team License

For organizational teams up to 25 people. Includes facilitation guides, team implementation protocols, and the full suite of diagnostic calculators and scenario planners.

Inquire About Team
🏢

Institutional License

Enterprise-wide deployment for nonprofits, HBCUs, and mission-driven organizations. Practitioner certification pathway included. Potential for significant annual licensing revenue.

Request Institutional Briefing
